ODS_LOAD_RUN_CHK: SELECT PROCESS_CD as ODS_PROCESS_CD, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'START_DT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD) AS ODS_LAST_RUN_DT , LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'LOAD_STATUS_CD' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD) AS ODS_LOAD_STATUS_CD FROM (SELECT PROCESS_CD, CONFIG_CD, CONFIG_VALUE FROM PROCESS_CONFIG PC WHERE 1 = 1 AND PC.PROCESS_CD = 'CUST_ODS_LOAD' AND PC.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = 'A' ) GROUP BY PROCESS_CD
LOAD_STATUS_CHK_QUERY: SELECT CASE WHEN ODS_LOAD_STATUS_CD = 'C' AND TO_DATE(ODS_LAST_RUN_DT, 'MM/DD/YYYY') = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS LOAD_STATUS_CHK FROM (SELECT PROCESS_CD AS ODS_PROCESS_CD, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'START_DT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD) AS ODS_LAST_RUN_DT, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'LOAD_STATUS_CD' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD) AS ODS_LOAD_STATUS_CD FROM (SELECT PROCESS_CD, CONFIG_CD, CONFIG_VALUE FROM PROCESS_CONFIG PC WHERE PC.PROCESS_CD = 'CUST_ODS_LOAD' AND PC.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = 'A') GROUP BY PROCESS_CD)
PIPELINE_EXT_RUN_CHK: SELECT CASE WHEN to_date(START_DT, 'MM/DD/YYYY') +TERM <= SYSDATE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EXTRACT_START FROM ( SELECT PROCESS_CD AS ODS_PROCESS_CD, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'START_DT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD) AS START_DT , LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'TERM' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD) AS TERM FROM (SELECT PROCESS_CD, CONFIG_CD, CONFIG_VALUE FROM PROCESS_CONFIG PC WHERE 1 = 1 AND PC.PROCESS_CD = 'PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT' AND PC.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = 'A') GROUP BY PROCESS_CD )
MAIN_CONFIG_QUERY: SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.START_DT), 'MM/DD/YYYY'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS ADJUD_FILE_DT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.START_DT), 'MM/DD/YYYY')+TERM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS FILE_DATE, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHHMISS') AS CURRENT_TIMESTMP, A.* FROM ( SELECT PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SP_DTL_RPT_FULL_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SP_DTL_RPT_FULL_PATH, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'DTL_RPT_TO_SHAREPOINT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS DTL_RPT_TO_SHAREPOINT, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'WEBDIR_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS WEBDIR_PATH,LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'COPY_TO_SHAREPOINT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS COPY_TO_SHAREPOINT, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'DTL_RPT_FILE_NAME' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS DTL_RPT_FILE_NAME,LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'DTL_RPT_FILE_EXT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS DTL_RPT_FILE_EXT,LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SHAREPOINT_DTL_RPT_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SHAREPOINT_DTL_RPT_PATH,LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'REPORT_QUERY' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS REPORT_QUERY,LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SEND_DETAIL_REPORT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SEND_DETAIL_REPORT,LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SUMMARY_FILE_NAME' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SUMMARY_FILE_NAME, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SUMMARY_FILE_EXT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SUMMARY_FILE_EXT, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SHAREPOINT_DOC_LIBRARY' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SHAREPOINT_DOC_LIBRARY, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'HTML_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS HTML_PATH, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SHAREPOINT_FULL_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SHAREPOINT_FULL_PATH, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SHAREPOINT_SITE' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SHAREPOINT_SITE, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SHAREPOINT_TARGET_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SHAREPOINT_TARGET_PATH, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'FILE_EXTENSION' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS FILE_EXTENSION, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'LINE_BREAK_TYPE' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS LINE_BREAK_TYPE, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'PIPELINE_EXT_RUN_CHK' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS PIPELINE_EXT_RUN_CHK, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'TOUCH_FILE_SERVER' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS TOUCH_FILE_SERVER, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'ZIP_FILE' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS ZIP_FILE, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'OUTBOUND_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS OUTBOUND_PATH, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'ARCHIVE_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS ARCHIVE_PATH, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'PLAN_ID' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS PLAN_ID, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'CLIENT_ID' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS CLIENT_ID, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'FILE_SEQ_NO' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS FILE_SEQ_NO, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'EXTRACT_COUNT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS EXTRACT_COUNT, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'RUNOUT_TERM' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS RUNOUT_TERM, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'MEMBER_TOC_TERM' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS MEMBER_TOC_TERM, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'TOC_TERM' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS TOC_TERM, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SHAREPOINT_ACCOUNT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SHAREPOINT_ACCOUNT, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SHAREPOINT_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SHAREPOINT_PATH, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'CONFIG_FILEPATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS CONFIG_FILEPATH, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'SQL_FILENM' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS SQL_FILENM, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'ORA_CONN_ACCOUNT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS ORA_CONN_ACCOUNT, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'EMAIL_NOTIFY' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS EMAIL_NOTIFY, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'EMAIL_CONN_ACCOUNT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS EMAIL_CONN_ACCOUNT, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'FTP_CONN_ACCOUNT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS FTP_CONN_ACCOUNT, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'FTP_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS FTP_PATH, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'START_DT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS START_DT, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'TERM' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS TERM, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'MCO' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS MCO, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'AWS_CONN_ACCOUNT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS AWS_CONN_ACCOUNT, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'S3_PATH' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS S3_PATH, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'EXTRACT_FILENM' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS EXTRACT_FILENM, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'HTML_FILENM' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS HTML_FILENM, LISTAGG ( CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'JETS_CONN_ACCOUNT' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS JETS_CONN_ACCOUNT, LISTAGG (CASE WHEN CONFIG_CD = 'JETS_SCHEMA' THEN CONFIG_VALUE END) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD) AS JETS_SCHEMA FROM (SELECT P.PROCESS_CD, I.INTERFACE_CD, CASE WHEN PC.CONFIG_CD = IC.CONFIG_CD THEN IC.CONFIG_CD ELSE PC.CONFIG_CD END AS CONFIG_CD, CASE WHEN PC.CONFIG_CD = IC.CONFIG_CD THEN IC.CONFIG_VALUE ELSE PC.CONFIG_VALUE END AS CONFIG_VALUE FROM PROCESS P, INTERFACE I, PROCESS_CONFIG PC, INTERFACE_PROCESS_CONFIG IC WHERE 1 = 1 AND P.PROCESS_CD = 'PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT' AND P.PROCESS_CD = I.PROCESS_CD AND P.PROCESS_CD = PC.PROCESS_CD AND I.INTERFACE_CD = IC.INTERFACE_CD(+) AND I.PROCESS_CD = IC.PROCESS_CD(+) AND PC.PROCESS_CD = IC.PROCESS_CD(+) AND PC.CONFIG_CD = IC.CONFIG_CD(+) AND P.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = 'A' AND P.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = I.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG AND P.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = PC.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG AND I.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = IC.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG(+)) GROUP BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD ORDER BY PROCESS_CD, INTERFACE_CD ) A
UPD_LOAD_STAT_PROGRS: UPDATE PROCESS_CONFIG SET CONFIG_VALUE='S' , LAST_UPD_TIMESTAMP=sysdate WHERE CONFIG_CD='LOAD_STATUS_CD' and PROCESS_CD='PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT'
UPD_LOAD_STAT_CMPLT: UPDATE PROCESS_CONFIG SET CONFIG_VALUE='C', LAST_UPD_TIMESTAMP=sysdate WHERE CONFIG_CD='LOAD_STATUS_CD' and PROCESS_CD='PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT'
UPD_START_DT: UPDATE PROCESS_CONFIG SET CONFIG_VALUE=to_char(to_date(CONFIG_VALUE,'mm/dd/yyyy')+$TERM,'mm/dd/yyyy'), LAST_UPD_TIMESTAMP =sysdate WHERE CONFIG_CD='START_DT'  and PROCESS_CD='PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT'
GET_FTP_DTL: select distinct fd.PROCESS_CD as PROCESS_CD ,fd.JOB_RUN_ID as JOB_RUN_ID,fc.SOURCE_PATH as SOURCE_PATH ,fc.DESTINATION_PATH as DESTINATION_PATH,ftp.USER_NAME as USERNAME, ftp.PASSWORD, pc.CONFIG_VALUE as FTP_CONN_ACCOUNT from job_file_details fd, file_transfer_config fc, (SELECT P.PROCESS_CD,I.INTERFACE_CD, CASE WHEN PC.CONFIG_CD=IC.CONFIG_CD THEN IC.CONFIG_CD ELSE PC.CONFIG_CD END AS CONFIG_CD, CASE WHEN PC.CONFIG_CD=IC.CONFIG_CD THEN IC.CONFIG_VALUE ELSE PC.CONFIG_VALUE END AS CONFIG_VALUE FROM PROCESS P , INTERFACE I , PROCESS_CONFIG PC , INTERFACE_PROCESS_CONFIG IC WHERE 1=1 AND P.PROCESS_CD=  'PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT'  AND P.PROCESS_CD=I.PROCESS_CD AND P.PROCESS_CD=PC.PROCESS_CD AND I.INTERFACE_CD=IC.INTERFACE_CD(+) AND I.PROCESS_CD=IC.PROCESS_CD(+) AND PC.PROCESS_CD=IC.PROCESS_CD(+) AND PC.CONFIG_CD =IC.CONFIG_CD(+) AND P.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG='A' AND P.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG=I.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG AND P.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG=PC.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG AND I.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG=IC.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG(+) AND PC.CONFIG_CD = 'FTP_CONN_ACCOUNT' ORDER BY P.PROCESS_CD,I.INTERFACE_CD) pc ,(SELECT FTP_CREDENTIAL_ID, USER_NAME, utl_raw.cast_to_varchar2(utl_encode.base64_decode(PASSWORD)) as PASSWORD FROM FTP_CREDENTIAL) ftp where 1=1 and fd.PROCESS_CD = 'PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT'  and fd.job_run_id= $JOB_RUN_ID  and fd.interface_cd=fc.interface_cd and fd.PROCESS_CD =fc.PROCESS_CD and fc.DESTINATION_CREDENTIAL_ID = ftp.FTP_CREDENTIAL_ID(+) and fd.interface_cd=pc.interface_cd and fd.PROCESS_CD =pc.PROCESS_CD and substr(fc.SOURCE_FILE_NAME_FORMAT,1,instr(SOURCE_FILE_NAME_FORMAT,'_',-1))= substr(fd.FILE_NAME,1,instr(FILE_NAME,'_',-1)) and fc.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG='A'
GET_INTERFACE_COUNT: SELECT nvl(COUNT( distinct ip.interface_Cd),0) AS interface_COUNT, i.PROCESS_CD ,pc.config_value as extract_count FROM INTERFACE i, INTERFACE_PROCESS_CONFIG ip,PROCESS_CONFIG pc, JOB_FILE_DETAILS f WHERE 1=1 AND i.process_cd='PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT' AND i.PROCESS_CD =i.PROCESS_CD AND pc.PROCESS_CD =i.PROCESS_CD AND PC.CONFIG_CD='EXTRACT_COUNT' AND i.interface_cd=ip.interface_cd(+) AND i.PROCESS_CD =ip.PROCESS_CD(+) AND i.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = 'A' AND i.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = ip.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG(+) AND ip.CONFIG_CD='EXTRACT_FILENM' AND f.INTERFACE_CD = ip.INTERFACE_CD AND f.PROCESS_CD =ip.PROCESS_CD AND f.REC_INACTIVE_FLAG = 'A' AND SUBSTR(f.FILE_NAME,INSTR(FILE_NAME,'.',1)) ='.dat' GROUP BY i.PROCESS_CD,pc.config_value
UPD_FILE_SEQNO: MERGE INTO PROCESS_CONFIG G USING ( select LPAD(config_value+1, 6,0) AS CONFIG_VALUE, CONFIG_CD, PROCESS_CD from PROCESS_CONFIG WHERE PROCESS_CD='PIPELINE_DATA_EXTRACT' and config_cd='FILE_SEQ_NO' ) S ON (G.PROCESS_CD=S.PROCESS_CD AND G.CONFIG_CD=S.CONFIG_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET G.CONFIG_VALUE=S.CONFIG_VALUE,G.LAST_UPD_TIMESTAMP=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
